presets.title: Mobilitat de maluc i tren inferior
presets.description: Generator-mode lower body mobility routine focusing on hip flexors, hip external rotators, hamstrings and ankle mobility. Suitable post-run or as a standalone 20-minute session.
presets.notes: Static and dynamic stretches for post-run recovery or dedicated mobility work; may help improve hip range of motion with consistent practice.

presets.title: Mobilitat toràcica i espatlles
presets.description: Faithful-mode thoracic spine and shoulder mobility routine inspired by yoga/pilates. 2 sessions/week of 15–20 minutes. Addresses the anterior chain tightness common in sedentary or desk-work populations.
presets.notes: Consistent thoracic mobility work is associated with improved posture and reduced neck/shoulder tension in evidence-based literature; results may vary.

sessions.label: Sessió A — Rotació toràcica + apertura de pit

presets.title: Rutina de mobilitat global
presets.description: Faithful-mode full-body mobility routine suitable for any level. 3 sessions/week, 20 minutes each, alternating lower body, upper body, and integrated mobility. Can be used as a standalone program or added after training.
presets.notes: Full-body mobility program; evidence suggests consistent multi-week mobility work can improve joint range of motion and may contribute to injury risk reduction.

mobilitat_tren_inferior_v1.name: Mobilitat de maluc i tren inferior
mobilitat_tren_inferior_v1.description: Rutina de mobilitat en mode generador per al tren inferior: flexors de maluc, rotadors externs, isquiotibials i turmell. Adequada post-cursa o com a sessió independent de 20 minuts.

mobilitat_toracica_espatlles_v1.name: Mobilitat toràcica i espatlles
mobilitat_toracica_espatlles_v1.description: Rutina fidel de mobilitat toràcica i d'espatlles inspirada en yoga/pilates. 2 sessions/setmana de 15–20 minuts. Aborda la rigidesa de la cadena anterior habitual en poblacions sedentàries.

rutina_mobilitat_global_v1.name: Rutina de mobilitat global
rutina_mobilitat_global_v1.description: Rutina fidel de mobilitat de cos complet per a qualsevol nivell. 3 sessions/setmana de 20 minuts alternant mobilitat de tren inferior, tren superior i integrada.

mobilitat_tren_inferior_v1.name: Movilidad de cadera y tren inferior
mobilitat_tren_inferior_v1.description: Rutina de movilidad en modo generador para el tren inferior: flexores de cadera, rotadores externos, isquiotibiales y tobillo. Adecuada post-carrera o como sesión independiente de 20 minutos.

mobilitat_toracica_espatlles_v1.name: Movilidad torácica y hombros
mobilitat_toracica_espatlles_v1.description: Rutina fiel de movilidad torácica y de hombros inspirada en yoga/pilates. 2 sesiones/semana de 15–20 minutos. Aborda la rigidez de la cadena anterior habitual en poblaciones sedentarias.

rutina_mobilitat_global_v1.name: Rutina de movilidad global
rutina_mobilitat_global_v1.description: Rutina fiel de movilidad de cuerpo completo para cualquier nivel. 3 sesiones/semana de 20 minutos alternando movilidad de tren inferior, tren superior e integrada.

mobilitat_tren_inferior_v1.name: Hip & lower body mobility
mobilitat_tren_inferior_v1.description: Generator-mode lower body mobility routine targeting hip flexors, external rotators, hamstrings and ankle. Suitable post-run or as a standalone 20-minute session.

mobilitat_toracica_espatlles_v1.name: Thoracic spine & shoulder mobility
mobilitat_toracica_espatlles_v1.description: Faithful-mode thoracic and shoulder mobility routine inspired by yoga/pilates. 2 sessions/week of 15–20 minutes. Addresses anterior chain tightness common in sedentary or desk-work populations.

rutina_mobilitat_global_v1.name: Global mobility routine
rutina_mobilitat_global_v1.description: Faithful-mode full-body mobility routine for any level. 3 sessions/week of 20 minutes alternating lower body, upper body, and integrated mobility.
